candidates.claim: Sum of first n integers is n(n+1)/2 (Gauss).
candidates.evidence: identity sum_1_to_n held over 60 random n∈[1,500]

candidates.claim: Sum of first n squares is n(n+1)(2n+1)/6.
candidates.evidence: identity sum_squares held over 40 random n∈[1,500]

candidates.claim: Sum of first n cubes equals the square of the sum of first n integers.
candidates.evidence: identity sum_cubes_eq_sq_of_sum held over 40 random n∈[1,500]

candidates.claim: Sample mean of a fair die converges to 3.5 (LLN).
Arithmetic mean ≥ geometric mean for positive reals (AM-GM).
